core.headline: Foundational vision and learning methods for robust generalization
core.abstract: This area investigates scalable visual representations and adaptation strategies that remain reliable across data shifts, label scarcity, and long-tail conditions.

workstreams.title: Representation and Adaptation
workstreams.description: Learn transferable visual features that can be reused across tasks and domains with minimal fine-tuning cost.

workstreams.title: Generalization Protocols
workstreams.description: Build consistent evaluation protocols for robustness under domain shift, class imbalance, and noisy supervision.

workstreams.title: Efficient Training Recipes
workstreams.description: Improve pretraining and adaptation loops with compute-aware recipes and reproducible experiment baselines.

milestones: Benchmark updates with controlled robustness settings

multi-modal.headline: Efficient and practical multimodal intelligence for deployment
multi-modal.abstract: This area focuses on making large language and multimodal models lighter, faster, and easier to deploy while preserving reasoning quality.

workstreams.title: Compression and Distillation
workstreams.description: Study compression methods that minimize quality loss under strict latency and memory constraints.

workstreams.title: System-level Optimization
workstreams.description: Optimize inference kernels, scheduling, and batching policies for stable production serving.

workstreams.title: Task-aware Fine-tuning
workstreams.description: Design lightweight adaptation pipelines for downstream multimodal tasks with limited domain data.

application.headline: Embodied AI from perception to reliable robot behavior
application.abstract: This area connects visual-language understanding to robot policies for practical perception-to-action pipelines in real environments.

workstreams.title: Vision-Language-Action Integration
workstreams.description: Align multimodal understanding modules with robot policies for instruction-following and task execution.

workstreams.title: 3D-aware Perception
workstreams.description: Improve object and scene understanding using geometry-aware representations for manipulation tasks.

workstreams.title: Efficient Robotics Runtime
workstreams.description: Reduce latency and improve control stability for real-time deployment in physical systems.

milestones: Closed-loop demo protocol with safety gates

biomedical.headline: Trustworthy AI for industrial reliability and medical analysis
biomedical.abstract: This area applies machine learning to industry and healthcare with emphasis on reliability, interpretability, and robust validation in real use cases.

workstreams.title: Battery and Fault Analytics
workstreams.description: Model degradation and detect anomalies to support predictive maintenance and reliability planning.

workstreams.title: Medical Image Intelligence
workstreams.description: Develop robust and calibrated diagnostic support pipelines for clinical imaging tasks.

workstreams.title: Deployment and Validation
workstreams.description: Define practical validation protocols and interpretable outputs for stakeholders in regulated domains.

milestones: Domain validation report with partner feedback
